title: Soft Quilted Toilet Rolls Bulk Buy - Super Quality 3 Ply Toilet Tissue Roll Provide Ultimate Comfort- Pack of 45 Rolls (1 x 45 Pack) White 3 Ply Toilet Rolls (1 Pack- 45 Rolls)
features: EXECUTIVE DESIGN: These quilted soft toilet rolls are crafted with a luxurious three-ply layer. Each roll provides deep quilted softness for a gentle, sumptuous clean. The unique embossed pattern not only adds comfort but also a premium touch, turning every use into a moment of luxury.

SPECIAL FEATURES: Manufactured from high-quality, super-soft tissue paper, these rolls ensure both strength and maximum absorption. A reliable solution for everyday personal hygiene, they help reduce risks of bathroom-borne issues, giving you peace of mind with every use.

PREMIUM STANDARD: These luxury toilet rolls are designed for convenience, whether placed on a holder or hung on the wall. Compatible with most standard toilet roll dispensers, they are practical and easy to use in any washroom setting.

SIZE & ECO-FRIENDLY: Made from sustainably sourced virgin pulp tissue, these 3-ply eco-friendly rolls are soft, strong, and durable. Each roll provides approximately 155 sheets of high-quality tissue, fitting perfectly in most standard toilet paper holders.

PACK OF 45 – MADE IN THE UK: This bulk pack of 45 premium quilted toilet rolls is manufactured in the UK to the highest standards. Offering outstanding softness and absorbency at great value, they are a cost-effective and environmentally responsible choice for your home or workplace.
